message.content: {"explanation": "The defendant is a first-time offender who committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling $25,000 from their employer. However, mitigating factors include the lack of a prior criminal record and the partial restitution already made, demonstrating some willingness to take responsibility. A short period of incarceration is warranted to serve as a deterrent and reflect the seriousness of the crime, which will be followed by a probationary period to ensure full restitution is completed.", "verdict": 6}

decoded.explanation: The defendant is a first-time offender who committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling $25,000 from their employer. However, mitigating factors include the lack of a prior criminal record and the partial restitution already made, demonstrating some willingness to take responsibility. A short period of incarceration is warranted to serve as a deterrent and reflect the seriousness of the crime, which will be followed by a probationary period to ensure full restitution is completed.
